CONTEXT: Step-by-step configuration: Navigate to Settings > Properties > Create property > Score type. Name property 'Research Intent Score'. Add positive criteria: form submissions for educational content +15, blog page views (set condition 3+ in 7 days) +10, webinar registration +20, video watch >50% +8. Add negative criteria: careers page -10, investor relations -15, quick bounce -5. Set 100 point limit (Professional) or custom (Enterprise). Configure 90-day time window with decay: 100% for <30 days, 75% for 31-60, 50% for 61-90. Test with known contacts. Note: scoring doesn't apply retroactively to historical data.
VECTOR: Provides granular configuration details ensuring readers can implement immediately without guesswork.
N-GRAMS: score property setup | threshold configuration | point values | time decay settings
COMMENTS: Screenshot placeholder: property creation. Include specific values. Warning about retroactive scoring.

HEADINGS: Integrating Breeze Intelligence for Third-Party Signals
CONTEXT: Explain Breeze Intelligence as the third-party data layer. Setup: navigate to Settings > Integrations > Breeze Intelligence > Enable. Configure topic tracking: select relevant topics (RevOps, CRM, Sales Automation), set surge thresholds. Explain credit structure: 10 credits per company enrichment, monthly limits by tier. Detail signal types: company research activity, topic surge alerts, competitive research indicators. Explain how to combine with first-party: if behavioral score >30 AND Breeze surge detected, priority = high. Address accuracy limitations for smaller companies. Note alternative providers (Bombora, 6sense) require separate subscriptions starting $2,000/month.

HEADINGS: Building Automated Workflows for Research-Stage Leads
CONTEXT: Design three essential workflows. Workflow 1 (Score-Based): trigger at Research Intent Score >30, enroll in 'Early Stage Nurture' list, assign to BDR for soft touch, send educational content sequence. Workflow 2 (Behavioral): trigger on 2+ downloads in 7 days, send personalized follow-up, notify rep, add to accelerated nurture. Workflow 3 (Threshold Alert): at score 50 create task, at 75 schedule sales outreach. Configure: re-enrollment on, suppression for customers/competitors, branching by content type consumed. Include STAT_04 (intent campaigns 4x pipeline, 6sense) to justify automation investment. Explain optimization: if nurture <20% open rate, reduce frequency. HEADINGS: Common Implementation Mistakes and How to Avoid Them
CONTEXT: Address seven critical errors. 1) Conflating research with purchase intent - solution: separate scoring models, different nurture paths. 2) Over-scoring single actions - solution: require multiple signals over time. 3) Ignoring time decay - solution: implement 90-day decay. 4) Poor sales-marketing alignment on definitions - solution: jointly define thresholds and handoff. 5) No negative scoring - solution: subtract for disqualifying behaviors. 6) Set-and-forget approach - solution: monthly conversion review. 7) Overwhelming research leads with sales outreach - solution: educational nurture first. Include diagnostic checklist for troubleshooting poor performance.
VECTOR: Help readers avoid common pitfalls that reduce research intent tracking effectiveness.
